evals.prompt: Design an offline sync strategy for a note-taking app
evals.expected_output: Cache Storage + IndexedDB strategy with appropriate cache-first or stale-while-revalidate policies per data type
assertions: different data types use different cache strategies

evals.prompt: A user's access is revoked but they can still read cached content, fix this
evals.expected_output: Zombie detection implemented to notify user and block further reads after revocation
assertions: revoked access is detected on reconnect

evals.prompt: Cache version update is silently clearing user data, fix the migration
evals.expected_output: Cache and DB version numbers bumped with intentional migration logic, no silent clears
assertions: old caches are cleaned up by service worker
headers are sent even when offline data is queued
